---
title: "DSCI 310 Group 4 Data Analysis Project - Predicting Consumer Online Purchasing Behavior"
author: "Athena Wong, Gracie Shao, Oscar Yik, and Raghav Vashisht"
editor: source
markdown:
  wrap: 72
bibliography: references/references.bib
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  output: true
engine: knitr
---

# Predicting Online Purchasing Behaviour Using LASSO Logistic Regression

{{< include fragments/01_summary.qmd >}}

{{< include fragments/02_introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include fragments/03_data_loading.qmd >}}

{{< include fragments/04_data_cleaning.qmd >}}

{{< include fragments/05_eda.qmd >}}

{{< include fragments/06_data_modelling.qmd >}}

{{< include fragments/07_discussion.qmd >}}

{{< include fragments/08_references.qmd >}}
